aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Greeting message retrieved dynamically by Lambda at runtime
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: /app/config/greeting
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.value: Hello from CI/CD Automated Infrastructure! - Capstone 4
